raw_output: {"predictions": [{"common_name": "Willow Flycatcher", "scientific_name": "Empidonax traillii", "rank_hint": "species", "confidence": 0.85, "field_marks": "Small empidonax flycatcher, brownish-olive upperparts, clean white throat, pale whitish underparts, two distinct pale wing bars, pale orange lower mandible, white outer tail feather tip, plain brown rounded head with faint eye ring"}, {"common_name": "Alder Flycatcher", "scientific_name": "Empidonax alnorum", "rank_hint": "species", "confidence": 0.7, "field_marks": "Nearly identical plumage to Willow Flycatcher, overlapping breeding range, almost indistinguishable by sight alone"}, {"common_name": "Least Flycatcher", "scientific_name": "Empidonax minimus", "rank_hint": "species", "confidence": 0.5, "field_marks": "Smaller size, more prominent complete white eye ring, darker gray nape and head"}, {"common_name": "Acadian Flycatcher", "scientific_name": "Empidonax virescens", "rank_hint": "species", "confidence": 0.4, "field_marks": "Larger size, more green-tinged upperparts, longer thicker bill, more distinct eye ring"}], "abstain": false, "abstain_reason": null, "overall_confidence": 0.7}
